name: Rice Piemontesa My Way
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice in water and 3 chicken stock cubes until it is just covered by about two fingers.
2. Cook the mushrooms in butter until all the liquid has evaporated.
3. Add the cooked rice, nutmeg, pepper, salt, heavy cream, and plenty of Parmesan cheese to the mushroom mixture. Stir well.
4. Serve immediately.
